codeReview.summary: The feature implementation matches the contract: Signer Policies rows are now sourced from live `policyOverrides` instead of `MOCK_SIGNER_RULES`, render method + peer short id + decision pill (Always/Allow once/Deny), and row removal dispatches `removePolicyOverride` with the exact `(peer, direction, method)` tuple. Empty-state behavior is correctly preserved when no overrides exist.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Verification logging can misstate command success when output is piped (e.g., to `tail`) because pipelines often return the last command's exit code. This can produce `exitCode: 0` even when tests were intentionally failing (RED), reducing trust in handoff command status data.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff file /Users/plebdev/.factory/missions/b48100dd-0e6c-4a7c-90a3-f12e61d1c3c4/handoffs/2026-04-22T00-11-38-112Z__m3-signer-policies-crud__1a2ae2be-f8eb-4481-ad8f-1d8eafd3d3bd.json lines 21-24 records a pre-implementation RED run but `exitCode` is still 0.
